list.name: Poller Events
list.rawQuery: SELECT ts AS time, event_type || ': ' || COALESCE(details, '') AS text FROM poller_events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

targets.rawSql: SELECT source_reading_time AS time, w_now AS "Production (W)" FROM production_overview WHERE source_type = 'production' AND $__timeFilter(source_reading_time) ORDER BY source_reading_time
SELECT source_reading_time AS time, w_now AS "Consumption (W)" FROM production_overview WHERE source_type = 'total-consumption' AND $__timeFilter(source_reading_time) ORDER BY source_reading_time
SELECT source_reading_time AS time, w_now AS "Net (W)" FROM production_overview WHERE source_type = 'net-consumption' AND $__timeFilter(source_reading_time) ORDER BY source_reading_time
SELECT source_reading_time AS time, voltage AS "Voltage (V)" FROM meter_readings WHERE meter_type = 'production' AND $__timeFilter(source_reading_time) ORDER BY source_reading_time
SELECT source_reading_time AS time, frequency AS "Frequency (Hz)" FROM meter_readings WHERE meter_type = 'production' AND $__timeFilter(source_reading_time) ORDER BY source_reading_time
SELECT DISTINCT ON (serial_number) serial_number, watts, max_watts, source_reading_time AS "Last Report" FROM inverter_readings ORDER BY serial_number, source_reading_time DESC

SELECT date_trunc('day', source_reading_time) AS time, MAX(wh_lifetime) - MIN(wh_lifetime) AS "Production (Wh)", (SELECT MAX(w2.wh_lifetime) - MIN(w2.wh_lifetime) FROM production_overview w2 WHERE w2.source_type = 'total-consumption' AND date_trunc('day', w2.source_reading_time) = date_trunc('day', production_overview.source_reading_time)) AS "Consumption (Wh)" FROM production_overview WHERE source_type = 'production' AND $__timeFilter(source_reading_time) GROUP BY date_trunc('day', source_reading_time) ORDER BY time
